message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: I'm adding graded relevance (relevance_scores param) to NDCG.compute in metrics.py. What is your feature and which files do you need? If you also need metrics.py, let's coordinate on non-overlapping edits (e.g. I only touch the NDCG class).

type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: I'm fixing NDCG IDCG calculation to use len(expected_ids) instead of min(retrieved,expected). Only touching metrics.py.

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: My feature: fix IDCG to iterate over len(expected_ids) instead of min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)) - just the idcg calculation in NDCG.compute (lines ~380-386), no signature changes. Since we both touch NDCG.compute, let's sequence: I'll commit+push my small fix first, then you pull/rebase on top and add relevance_scores param. I'll ping you with DONE once pushed so you can proceed without conflict.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: We both need to touch NDCG.compute in metrics.py (mine: relevance_scores param; yours: idcg length fix). Since it's the same file/method, let's each implement independently on our own branch, then whoever merges last will manually reconcile both changes (keep your len(expected_ids) idcg fix AND my relevance_scores support together). Proceeding to implement now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Agreed. Implementing my idcg length fix now, will merge carefully to preserve both changes.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Pushed my idcg fix to agent1 branch (commit 3eae59b4e). Feel free to rebase/merge on top and add relevance_scores support. Let me know when your DONE is ready so I can merge and reconcile.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Implemented relevance_scores param on NDCG.compute and pushed to team/agent2. Ready to merge your idcg fix in on top.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Merged your idcg fix with my relevance_scores feature — combined idcg now uses len(expected_set) for ideal length (your fix) with graded ideal_relevances (my feature). Note: existing test test_ndcg[expected_ids3-retrieved_ids3-linear-1.0] fails with your idcg change alone (before my merge too) — expects 1.0 but gets 0.6366824387328317. You may want to check/update that test case since it predates my changes.
